summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. The job explicitly says this is not a dedupe cluster and provides no shared canonical, so each open PR is kept as an independent candidate unless its own hydrated evidence shows a specific blocker requiring maintainer judgment. No GitHub mutations are planned.

actions.reason: Independent open PR needing normal review/proof; no close or merge action is justified.
Maintainer-owned draft PR should remain open as independent work.

Unresolved substantive review concerns require maintainer/author follow-up.
